title: Health spend per year of life
description: Annual health spend ($/person) ÷ life expectancy — lower = more longevity per $
producer: World Bank (WHO) ÷ ONS national life tables
measure: Annual health spend ($/person) ÷ life expectancy — lower = more longevity per $

provenance.source: World Bank (WHO) ÷ ONS national life tables
provenance.methodology: Computed as Health spending per person ÷ Life expectancy at birth, aligned by year.
provenance.derivation: Computed from dhsc-health-spend-pc, life-expectancy: Computed as Health spending per person ÷ Life expectancy at birth, aligned by year.

limitations: Govviz is a downstream compiler, not the primary publisher.
The primary producer may not publish the same tidy structure, stable id, CSVW metadata, or validation range upstream.
Freshness metadata is inferred from observed periods and fetch timestamps; it is not an official release calendar.
The contact and accountability route remains the primary producer's published route, not a Govviz official statistics contact.
